properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: LET your precious glory. The shekinah glory Come today to fill my heart And give me your salvation. (x2)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It gives us all the victory THE SHEKINAH GLORY, It keeps the life of the manna THE SHEKINAH GLORY, It is the pillar of fire THE SHEKINAH GLORY, It moves in the cloud of glory, THE SHEKINAH GLORY, Lord Jesus,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It gives the life to a dry rode THE SHEKINAH GLORY, It gives the life to the dry bones THE SHEKINAH GLORY It is the pillar of fire THE SHEKINAH GLORY It is the presence of Jesus THE SHEKINAH GLORY Oh JESUS,

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It opens the eyes of the blinds THE SHEKINAH GLORY. It resurrected Lazarus THE SHEKINAH GLORY It splitted the red sea in two THE SHEKINAH GLORY to destroy Egyptian armies THE SHEKINAH GLORY. Lord Jesus.
